title: Japanese Twitter speculation of Biblical proportions
display_title: Japanese Twitter speculation of Biblical proportions
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Twitter speculation of Biblical proportions             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Feb 09, 2014 2:53 am So I went on the internet today and found this: https://twitter.com/pakus002 This person seems to like to dig through stuff potentially relevant to Eva. The most fun part they've posted so far is a ton of quotations from the Book of Revelations with some Eva pics. So presented here for your consideration and/or amusement is a version of that twitter user's speculation. Images take straight from their account but the quoted passage is from the english version of the Book. Revelations 1:1 - The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave Him to show His servants—things which must shortly take place. And He sent and signified it by His angel to His servant John Revelations 1:18 - I am He who lives, and was dead, and behold, I am alive forevermore. Amen. And I have the keys of Hades and of Death. Revelations 4:1 - After these things I looked, and behold, a door standing open in heaven. Revelations 4:3 - And He who sat there was like a jasper and a sardius stone in appearance; and there was a rainbow around the throne, in appearance like an emerald. Revelations 4:6 - Before the throne there was a sea of glass, like crystal. And in the midst of the throne, and around the throne, were four living creatures full of eyes in front and in back. Revelations 5:6 - And I looked, and behold, in the midst of the throne and of the four living creatures, and in the midst of the elders, stood a Lamb as though it had been slain, having seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of God sent out into all the earth. Revelations 5:2 - saying with a loud voice: “Worthy is the Lamb who was slain To receive power and riches and wisdom, And strength and honor and glory and blessing!” Revelations 6:12 - I looked when He opened the sixth seal, and behold, there was a great earthquake; and the sun became black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became like blood. Revelations 8:8 - Then the second angel sounded: And something like a great mountain burning with fire was thrown into the sea, and a third of the sea became blood. Revelations 9:2 - And he opened the bottomless pit, and smoke arose out of the pit like the smoke of a great furnace. So the sun and the air were darkened because of the smoke of the pit. Revelations 9:9 - And they had breastplates like breastplates of iron, and the sound of their wings was like the sound of chariots with many horses running into battle. Revelations 9:15 - So the four angels, who had been prepared for the hour and day and month and year, were released to kill a third of mankind. Revelations 10:1 - I saw still another mighty angel coming down from heaven, clothed with a cloud. And a rainbow was on his head, his face was like the sun, and his feet like pillars of fire. Revelations 11:16-17 - And the twenty-four elders who sat before God on their thrones fell on their faces and worshiped God, saying: “We give You thanks, O Lord God Almighty, The One who is and who was and who is to come,[g] Because You have taken Your great power and reigned. Revelations 12:7-8 - And war broke out in heaven: Michael and his angels fought with the dragon; and the dragon and his angels fought, but they did not prevail, nor was a place found for them in heaven any longer. Revelations 12:16 - But the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed up the flood which the dragon had spewed out of his mouth. Revelations 13:2 - Now the beast which I saw was like a leopard, his feet were like the feet of a bear, and his mouth like the mouth of a lion. The dragon gave him his power, his throne, and great authority. Revelations 13:18 - Here is wisdom. Let him who has understanding calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man: His number is 666. Revelations 14:14 - Then I looked, and behold, a white cloud, and on the cloud sat One like the Son of Man, having on His head a golden crown, and in His hand a sharp sickle. Revelations 15:2 - And I saw something like a sea of glass mingled with fire, and those who have the victory over the beast, over his image and over his mark and over the number of his name, standing on the sea of glass, having harps of God. Revelations 16:1 - Then I heard a loud voice from the temple saying to the seven angels, “Go and pour out the bowls[a] of the wrath of God on the earth.” Revelations 16:3 - Then the second angel poured out his bowl on the sea, and it became blood as of a dead man; and every living creature in the sea died. Revelations 16:17 - Then the seventh angel poured out his bowl into the air, and a loud voice came out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, “It is done!” Revelations 17:11 - The beast that was, and is not, is himself also the eighth, and is of the seven, and is going to perdition. Revelations 17:14 - These will make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb will overcome them, for He is Lord of lords and King of kings; and those who are with Him are called, chosen, and faithful.” Revelations 19:19 - And I saw the beast, the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against Him who sat on the horse and against His army. Revelations 20:3 - and he cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal on him, so that he should deceive the nations no more till the thousand years were finished. But after these things he must be released for a little while. Revelations 20:4 - And I saw thrones, and they sat on them, and judgment was committed to them. Then I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for their witness to Jesus and for the word of God Revelations 20:7-8 - Now when the thousand years have expired, Satan will be released from his prison 8 and will go out to deceive the nations which are in the four corners of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle, whose number is as the sand of the sea. Revelations 20:13 - The sea gave up the dead who were in it, and Death and Hades delivered up the dead who were in them. And they were judged, each one according to his works. That's all the Book of Revelation stuff posted so far. Bonus picture: What this all means:

[]:             Quote Post by one-eyed » Sun Feb 09, 2014 6:14 am Sometimes I think the speculation about Eva is better, more exciting and interesting than reality!

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 8:10 am Wow! Really interesting. Is this coincidence or are all those similarities on purpose?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Feb 09, 2014 8:16 am Isn't that going a little too far in the interpretation? If we follow that theory, Mari is Satan and Shinji is Jesus! Also didn't the creators admitted that all these Christian references were just superficial and made for flavor, and that we shouldn't try to look too deeply in it?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Feb 09, 2014 8:16 am ^^Ask from Anno. OT: kakkoii as hell!

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:17 am ElMariachi wrote: Shinji is Jesus!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:37 am In any case, the Book of Revelations has always been susceptible to a wide range of fanciful interpretations - that's pretty much what it's for , it seems sometimes!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:48 am Someone described Revelations as "John on acid", and its apocalyptic content was related to events happening at the time it was written. The number 666, originally 616, was actually a numerical reference to Nero. Some of the images and events are a very poor fit for the verses, unless you're trying to force a fit. It's interesting, but upon a moment of skeptical thinking, it all falls apart.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:50 am Wow, that is cool! Revelations is actually the only part of the bible I've read for myself. Reason, cuz its got dragons and angels and shit fighting each other, its awesome! ^Oh and I don't believe a word of it, but its a interesting read lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Feb 09, 2014 10:25 am Tell me where you found that seven-eyed dog thing.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Feb 09, 2014 11:08 am Chuckman wrote: Tell me where you found that seven-eyed dog thing.

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Sun Feb 09, 2014 1:40 pm Boy, that is one heck of a stretch when it comes to speculations. I mean, I'm pretty sure that all the symbolism here is only there to look cool, not because it means anything. Which is pretty sad when you think about it. Also, if Gendo, Shinji and Asuka are King, Prince, and Princess respectively, wouldn;t that make the latter two siblings? Course, if they do pair them up because of symbolism, I'm gonna have to raise my eyebrow, as that's is quite a dubious way to go about it.

[]:             Quote Post by heavytread » Sun Feb 09, 2014 1:43 pm Wow I think that's some definite over analysistion Although the sea of blood thing is much of a stretch. (Revaltions is the apocalypse right?)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Feb 09, 2014 1:52 pm Cmon now, we can't stop here! We have years and years to waste until Final is out! King Solomon's Key (allegedly) http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Key_of_Solomon

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 09, 2014 4:28 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Another fun tweet from the person: Gendo = King of Lilin That makes Shinji a Prince We already know Asuka is a Princess LAS ending confirmed

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 09, 2014 6:20 pm That was immensely fun to read through. I think that Anno image macro sums things up pretty well.

[]:             Quote Post by artesox » Sun Feb 09, 2014 8:23 pm A very fun read, but to sincere I think most of those will lead to nowhere ahahaha. After all, we had far more obvious biblical references/coincidences that didn't lead nowhere (Mari being introduced in Bethany Base comes to mind, as far as we know there is no relation between the girl and Mary of Bethany.) The key of Solomon thing however really got my attention

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:12 pm Yeah, again, I'm pretty sure most of the symbolism is only here because of Rule Of Cool (which I have huge problems with, but that's an entirely different subject). Which also extends to the whole Prince and Princess thing between Shinji and Asuka. Like, talk about cheap way to get them together. My shipper is speaking now isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 10, 2014 3:34 am Guys, the King of Lilin/Prince/Princess thing is a joke you know! Besides Even if Gendo is called the "King of Lilin"(and only by Kaworu, unless Gendo made an alias from himself during the 14 years war), Shinji isn't considered any "Prince of the Lilin", at most he's the "Bearer of the Lilin's curse"!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Feb 10, 2014 3:43 am If Kaworu is the one calling Gendo King of Lilin that means Kaworu officially ships LAS.

Article: Japanese Twitter speculation of Biblical proportions
 am Someone described Revelations as "John on acid", and its apocalyptic content was related to events happening at the time it was written. The number 666, originally 616, was actually a numerical reference to Nero. Some of the images and events are a very poor fit for the verses, unless you're trying to force a fit. It's interesting, but upon a moment of skeptical thinking, it all falls apart.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 9:50 am Wow, that is cool! Revelations is actually the only part of the bible I've read for myself. Reason, cuz its got dragons and angels and shit fighting each other, its awesome! ^Oh and I don't believe a word of it, but its a interesting read lol.

I mean, I'm pretty sure that all the symbolism here is only there to look cool, not because it means anything. Which is pretty sad when you think about it. Also, if Gendo, Shinji and Asuka are King, Prince, and Princess respectively, wouldn;t that make the latter two siblings? Course, if they do pair them up because of symbolism, I'm gonna have to raise my eyebrow, as that's is quite a dubious way to go about it.
